description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a fenced backyard featuring a swimming pool and lounge chairs. The front facade is characterized by a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a single main entry door, while the side yard includes a driveway and a landscaped area with mature trees and shrubs. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, with some sections in light gray siding, and the windows are white-framed. The backyard is enclosed by a dark wooden fence, providing privacy for the pool and patio area. The house includes a garage visible from the front, and the landscaping in the front yard is neatly organized with hedges and paved walkways. The overall design is modern with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, fenced backyard with a pool, and landscaped front yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Side view showing the backyard pool, lounge chairs, and a landscaped area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, fenced backyard, and pool area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, lounge area, and the landscaped side yard.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry, garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small paved entry, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
